overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking across a rocky waterfront terrain toward a river, with an urban cityscape featuring a rusted bridge, highway overpasses, and mixed-era buildings in the background. The character stops at the water's edge to observe the surroundings before the screen fades to black.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rocky terrain toward the water's edge, passing orange construction barrels

entered.detail: large orange and white striped traffic barrels near a metal fence barrier
temporary metal fencing with concrete bases blocking off the left side
large rusted steel truss bridge with orange-brown arch structure spanning the river
multi-level concrete highway interchange visible in the background
dense cluster of modern glass skyscrapers and older brick buildings in the distance
uneven gravel and broken concrete ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward across a rocky construction area near a waterfront, passing orange traffic barrels and metal fencing. The rusted steel bridge and city skyline are visible ahead, with a highway overpass to the right, as the character approaches the river's edge.

events.description: screen gradually fades to black, ending the sequence

agents.ego_description: standing at the water's edge, slowly turning to survey the cityscape, bridge, and surrounding buildings

entered.detail: large red-brown brick housing projects with repetitive window patterns
calm blue water of the river with concrete retaining walls
metal chain-link fence running along the edge of the water
small leafy trees planted along the waterfront fence line

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the river's edge and stands observing the urban landscape. Tall brick apartment buildings rise on the left while the rusted steel bridge spans the water to the right. The character slowly turns to take in different views of the skyline, highway overpasses, and waterfront before the screen fades to black.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rugged construction site that culminates in a panoramic view of an urban waterfront. It begins with the character walking forward through a rocky area, passing orange traffic barrels and metal fencing while the rusted steel bridge and city skyline loom ahead. As the character reaches the river's edge, the movement shifts from a forward progression to a stationary observation of the surrounding landscape. The scene then expands to reveal tall brick apartment buildings on the left and the bridge spanning the water to the right, as the character slowly turns to take in the highway overpasses and skyline before the screen fades to black.
